stemHtml: For PBN operations, what is correct regarding fly-by waypoints and fly-over waypoints?

options.a: For fly-by waypoints, the turn to the next course is commenced when overhead the waypoint, and for fly-over waypoints the turn is commenced prior to reaching the waypoint.
options.b: For fly-by waypoints, the turn is commenced prior to reaching the waypoint, and for fly-over waypoints the turn is commenced when overhead the waypoint.
options.c: Fly-by waypoints use turn anticipation whereas fly-over waypoints require the pilot to turn 30 seconds before or after reaching the waypoint.
options.d: Fly-over waypoints use turn anticipation but fly-by waypoints do not.
